title: lepidium cartilagineum subsp. caespitosum
intro: Lepidium cartilagineum subsp. caespitosum, also known as cress, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lepidium cartilagineum subsp. caespitosum include its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use in treating various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
